# Setting Up Weighted Grading & Assignment Categories

Source: https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418670

Weighted categories let you match your teacher's grading scheme (e.g., Homework 30%, Quizzes 20%, Exams 50%). Weighted grading is enabled for a class whenever any of its categories has a **Weight (%)** value set.

## How to Set Up Weighted Grading

  1. Open [**Classes**](https://app.heliumedu.com/classes) and tap on the class you want to configure
  2. Select the **Categories** tab
  3. Tap the **+** button to add a category, or tap an existing category to edit it
  4. Set the **Weight (%)** field to match the weight given in your syllabus
  5. Tap **Save**
  6. Repeat for each category—all weights should add up to 100%

## Related Articles

  * [Setting Up and Managing Classes](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000427002)
  * [How Helium Calculates Your Grades](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418648)
  * [Why Your Grades Might Not Match Your LMS' or Teacher's](https://heliumedu.freshdesk.com/support/solutions/articles/159000418645)

---

## Helium Classic

In Helium Classic, the steps are similar but the navigation differs:

  1. Open [**Classes**](https://www.heliumedu.com/planner/classes) and click on the class you want to configure
  2. Click **Categories**
  3. Add a **Weight** for each category, matching the weights provided in your syllabus
  4. All **Weight** values should add up to 100%

__Helium Classic will remain available until July 31, 2026.__
